Zustand vs Redux Toolkit in 2026: Which State Management Library Should You Choose?
State management plays a critical role in building scalable React Native applications. As your app grows, managing data efficiently becomes essential for maintaining performance, improving developer experience, and keeping your codebase clean.
Two of the most popular solutions today are Zustand and Redux Toolkit (RTK). Both are excellent choices, but they solve problems in different ways.
In this article, we’ll compare Zustand and Redux Toolkit to help you choose the right solution for your next React Native project.
What is Zustand?
Zustand is a lightweight state management library created by the PMNDRS team. It focuses on simplicity, minimal boilerplate, and excellent performance.
Creating a store in Zustand requires very little code, making it easy to learn and quick to implement.
Advantages of Zustand

• Minimal boilerplate

• Small bundle size

• Easy to learn

• Excellent performance

• No Provider required

• Simple API
For many React Native applications, Zustand allows developers to focus more on building features and less on managing state configuration.
What is Redux Toolkit?
Redux Toolkit is the official, recommended way to write Redux applications. It simplifies traditional Redux by reducing boilerplate while keeping Redux’s predictable architecture.
Redux Toolkit includes utilities like:

• createSlice

• configureStore

• createAsyncThunk

• Redux DevTools support
It remains one of the best choices for large enterprise applications.
Learning Curve
Zustand
Developers can usually become productive with Zustand within a few hours.
The API is small, intuitive, and doesn’t require understanding reducers, actions, or middleware before getting started.
Redux Toolkit
Redux Toolkit is much easier than classic Redux, but there’s still more to learn.
You’ll need to understand:

• Store

• Slice

• Reducers

• Actions

• Middleware

• Async Thunks
While these concepts provide structure, they also increase complexity.
Boilerplate Comparison
One of Zustand’s biggest strengths is its simplicity.
A complete store can often be written in just a few lines of code.
Redux Toolkit significantly reduces Redux boilerplate but still requires:

• Store configuration

• Slice creation

• Action definitions

• Provider setup
For smaller projects, Zustand generally feels cleaner.
Performance
Both libraries offer excellent performance.
However, Zustand performs selective updates by default, helping reduce unnecessary re-renders with minimal configuration.
Redux Toolkit also performs well but often requires careful selector optimization in larger applications.
Developer Experience
Zustand
✔ Clean API
✔ Fast development
✔ Easy debugging
✔ Great TypeScript support
Redux Toolkit
✔ Powerful DevTools
✔ Predictable architecture
✔ Excellent ecosystem
✔ Ideal for large teams
Scalability
This is where Redux Toolkit shines.
If your application includes:

• Multiple development teams

• Complex business logic

• Large enterprise architecture

• Extensive middleware
Redux Toolkit provides more structure and consistency.
For startups, MVPs, and medium-sized applications, Zustand is often more than sufficient.
Which One Do I Prefer?
In many of my React Native projects, I prefer Zustand because it keeps the codebase clean and easy to maintain.
Its lightweight API allows me to build features faster while avoiding unnecessary complexity.
However, for enterprise-level applications involving large teams, strict architectural guidelines, and advanced workflows, Redux Toolkit remains an excellent choice.
The best decision depends on your project’s size, complexity, and team requirements.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Which One Should You Choose?
Choose Zustand if you want:

• Faster development

• Less boilerplate

• Smaller applications

• Better developer experience

• Simpler state management
Choose Redux Toolkit if you need:

• Enterprise scalability

• Complex business logic

• Advanced middleware

• Large development teams

• Mature debugging tools
Final Thoughts
There isn’t a universal winner.
Both Zustand and Redux Toolkit are powerful state management solutions used in production applications worldwide.
Choose the one that aligns with your project’s goals rather than following trends.
